'''jarïfthïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okayer|okayer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-r-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okayer|okayer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| jarïfthïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || jærïfthïfth || jærïfthïfj || jærïfthïfsh || jærïfthïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || jarïfrïfthïfth || jarïfrïfthïfj || jarïfrïfthïfsh || jarïfrïfthïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || jarïfthïfth || jarïfthïfj || jarïfthïfsh || jarïfthïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || jarïffthïffth || jarïffthïffj || jarïffthïffsh || jarïffthïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || jarïfthïfïf || jarïfthïfïf || jarïfthïfïf || jarïfthïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || jarïfthïfth || jarïfthïfj || jarïfthïfsh || jarïfthïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || jarïfthïfïfl || jarïfthïfïfl || jarïfthïfïfl || jarïfthïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || jarïfthïfïfïf || jarïfthïfïfïf || jarïfthïfïfïf || jarïfthïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || jarïfthïfïfn || jarïfthïfïfn || jarïfthïfïfn || jarïfthïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || jarïfthïfïforo || jarïfthïfïforo || jarïfthïfïforo || jarïfthïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
